chain.thought: Explanation: Counting occurrences of each team shows cska moscow (2), dnipro dnipropetrovsk (7), lokomotiv moscow (2), and spartak nizhny novgorod (1). The only team that appears exactly once is spartak nizhny novgorod.

judge_thought:
Explanation: The teams and their occurrences are:
- CSKA Moscow: listed twice (2004, 2005)
- Spartak Nizhny Novgorod: listed once (2006)
- Dnipro Dnipropetrovsk: listed multiple times (2006/07 through 2012/13)
- Lokomotiv Moscow: listed twice (2012/13, 2013/14)
Thus, the only team not listed more than once is Spartak Nizhny Novgorod.
